column1: Kaikki candyt ovat yhteensopivia useimpien liuotinpohjaisten basecoat/topcoat järjestelmien kanssa. Valitse järjestelmä joka parhaiten sopii tarkoituksiisi. Kaikki candytiivisteet sekoitetaan 8:1 sideaineen tai 1-k lakan kanssa. Jonka jälkeen seos ohennetaan

Varmasti että pohjaväri on haihdutettu kunnolla ja peittävyys on riittävä. Varmista että kaikki pohjatyöt näyttävän hyvältä ja pohjaväri on tasainen. Pohjatöiden virheet ja puutteet korostuvat todella paljon candy maalauksessa.
• Automaalit.net suosittelee Mipa 000 Väritön + Bc-Ohenne. Ohennus suhde tällöin 2:1
• Sekoita tuote todella hyvin ennen kuin kaadat sen purkista pois.

";"

column2:
follow the manufacturer's instructions for mixing ratios.

Make sure that the base color has evaporated properly and the coverage is sufficient. Make sure that all the ground work looks good and the ground color is even. The mistakes and shortcomings of the groundwork are highlighted a lot in the candy painting.

  • Mix with the binder in a ratio of 8:1
column3:
thin according to the instructions for the binder
  • Automaalit.net recommends Mipa 000 Colorless + Bc-Thinner. The dilution ratio is then 2:1
  • Mix the product really well before pouring it out of the jar.
  • 4-6 layers
column4:
the tone darkens according to the number of layers.

column1: Ruiskun säädöt ovat ehkä yksi vaikeimmista ja epäselvimmistä asioista maalaamisessa. column5: joka perustuu innovatiiviseen nanoteknologiaan. Tämä kirkaslakka tarjoaa erinomaisen suojan mekaanista kulutusta
column6: kuten mikronaarmuja ja kemiallista rasitusta vastaan. Esimerkiksi säännöllinen autonpesu ei vaikuta pinnan ulkonäköön samalla tavalla kuin perinteisellä kirkaslakalla lakattuun pintaan. Lisäksi pinta hylkii likaa paremmin.

column1: MIPA Nanolakka CS44 sopii erinomaisesti käytettäväksi laadukkaissa yli- ja osamaalauksissa
column3: moottoripyörien ja -kelkkojen sekä raskaiden ajoneuvojen pinnoilla. Se tarjoaa erinomaisen suojan erilaisille konstruktioille ja komponenteille
column5: moottoripyörien tankeille ja karkealle käsittelylle alttiille esineille. Tuote on erittäin säänkestävä ja sopii käytettäväksi sekä liuotin- että vesiohenteisten maalien päällä.

column1: Lisäksi MIPA Nanolakka CS44 alittaa EU:n ja USA:n päästörajoitukset (VOC < 420g/ltr).

MIPA Nanolacquer CS44 is a really durable and easy-to-clean clear lacquer based on innovative nanotechnology. This clear varnish offers excellent protection against mechanical wear
column2: such as micro-scratches and chemical stress. For example
column3: regular car washing does not affect the appearance of the surface in the same way as a surface varnished with traditional clear lacquer. In addition

column1: MIPA Nanolacquer CS44 is ideal for use in high-quality overpainting and underpainting
column2: such as on the surfaces of cars
column3: motorcycles and sleds and heavy vehicles. It provides excellent protection for various constructions and components
column5: motorcycle tanks and objects subject to rough handling. The product is very weather-resistant and suitable for use over both solvent and water-based paints.

column2: MIPA Nanolakka CS44 falls below EU and US emission limits (VOC < 420g/ltr).

column5: or even arts and crafts projects. This is a <strong data-end=""414"" data-start=""369"">high-quality

column1: Metal flake can be applied over any base colour

This premium metal flake is designed especially for demanding use where a <strong data-end=""1041"" data-start=""979"">durable
column4: and highly sparkling finish is required. The flakes are solvent resistant

column1: Metal Flake Application & Use
Metal Flake can be mixed with:
1K and 2K clear coats
solvent-based and water-based lacquers
Arts & Crafts applications
Basic Application Steps:
Prepare the surface according to a standard paint process (sanding
Spray 2–3 coats of base colour
Add the Metal Flake to clear coat or another chosen binder
Spray the flake mixture until the desired effect is achieved. (Always perform a test spray first to determine the preferred flake/clear ratio.)
Once the flake layer is complete
column2: apply 2K clear coat until the flakes are fully covered and a high-gloss finish is achieved

column1: Tips for a Perfect Finish
Use a gravity-feed spray gun with a minimum 1.5 mm fluid nozzle
Apply several thin coats to avoid runs
Monitor the surface between coats – spraying too wet can ruin the final result
When the flake level is satisfactory
column2: clean the spray gun thoroughly and apply clear coat without flake

column1: To achieve a perfectly smooth surface:
allow the clear coat to fully cure
perform wet sanding only on a fully cured surface
preferably after 2–3 weeks (at approx. +20 °C painting conditions)
re-clear the surface following normal instructions
Note! Wet sanding must not be performed before the clear coat is fully cured.
Packaging Information
Package size: 50 g
Flake size: 008 x .008 hex
Coverage depends on the amount of flake used and the desired effect.

Miten säädät maaliruiskun?

column1: Optimaalisen ruiskutuspaineen saamiseksi olisi suotavaa käyttää painemittaria joka on sijoitettu maaliruiskun ja paineilmaletkun väliin. Jos painemittaria ei kuitenkaan löydy
column2: säädöt on tehtävä kompressorista löytyvän painemittarin mukaan. Tällaisessa tilanteessa on tärkeää muistaa
column3: että paineilmaletku menettää kompressorin painetta. Siksi kompressorin paine tulee säätää huomattavasti suuremmaksi. Tähän löytyy yksi hyvä nyrkkisääntö:
ruiskutuspaine sekä suuttimen koko."" />Jokaista kymmentä (10) paineilmaletkun metriä kohti menetetään noin 1bar painetta.

column2: kompressorissa olevaan painemittariin on lisättävä suositellun maaliruiskun ruiskutuspaineen lisäksi edellä kuvatun ohjeen mukaisesti painetta. Esimerkiksi maaliruiskun ruiskutuspaine on ohjeen mukaan 2 bar:ia ja käytössäsi on 20 metrin paineilmaletku. Kompressorissa olevaan painemittariin tulee säätää 4 bar:ia painetta pitäen samalla maaliruiskun liipasinta pohjassa. Tällä tavalla maaliruiskuun tuleva paine on tämän säännön mukaan oikea.

column1: Paineilmamittarin säätö tulee tehdä niin että pidät ruiskun liipaisinta pohjassa. Silloin näet mittarissa sen paineen joka on käytössä kun maalaat. Jokaisen tuotteen purkin kyljestä löytyy vasemmalla olevan kuvan esimerkin kaltainen piktogrammi

Tässä kuvassa oikealle näet kaikkien maaliruiskun säätimien tehtävät. Yleensä maaliruiskuissa valmistajasta riippumatta nämä säätimet ovat samoissa paikoissa. Joissain malleissa kuitenkin esim. viuhkan säädin voi olla ruiskun kyljessä FLG kaiverruksen kohdilla.
Maalin syöttö kannattaa säätää niin että voit aina maalata liipaisin pohjassa
column2: koska tämä takaa sen että maalia on joka paikassa yhtä paksusti. Kun säädät maalin syötön järkevästi
column3: maalia ei tule esimerkiksi yllättäen liikaa. Tiedät aina kuinka paljon maalia tulee kun painat liipasimen pohjaan. Tämä estää myös valumien tuloa.

column1: Viuhkan säädintä tarvitaan silloin jos maalattava osa on laakeaa tai kapeaa pintaa. Kapeat kohdat kuten pyöränrungot
column2: oviaukot jne. on helpompi maalata kapealla viuhkalla. Silloin maalia ei mene niin paljon hukkaan ja saat tarkempaa jälkeä. Isot laakeat pinnat kuten konepelti
column3: katto jne. ovat puolestaan helpompi maalata leveällä viuhkalla. Silloin saat maalattua isompaa pinta-alaa ja työskentely on nopeampaa ja lopputulos on tasaisempi. Viuhkan säätöön ei ole kuitenkaan yhtä tiettyä oikeaa sääntöä vaan jokaisella maalarilla on omat mieltymykset.

column1: Ruiskun säädöt ovat ehkä yksi vaikeimmista ja epäselvimmistä asioista maalaamisessa. Paras vinkki onkin että kokeilet useita eri säätöjä - näin löydät itsellesi parhaat säädöt. Maaliruiskussa oleva paineensäädin on tarkoitettu hienosäätöön. Siksi kannattaa ensin säätää painemittarin kautta ruiskutuspaine mahdollisemman tarkasti ja vasta sen jälkeen hienosäätö. Maaliruiskun paineensäätimestä on esim. helppoa pudottaa painetta harsotukseen tai viimeistelevään värimassan pisarrukseen.

column1: Metal Flake Application & Use
Metal Flake can be mixed with:
1K and 2K clear coats
solvent-based and water-based lacquers
Arts & Crafts applications
Basic Application Steps:
Prepare the surface according to a standard paint process (sanding
Spray 2–3 coats of base colour
Add the Metal Flake to clear coat or another chosen binder
Spray the flake mixture until the desired effect is achieved. (Always perform a test spray first to determine the preferred flake/clear ratio.)
Once the flake layer is complete
column2: apply 2K clear coat until the flakes are fully covered and a high-gloss finish is achieved

column1: Tips for a Perfect Finish
Use a gravity-feed spray gun with a minimum 1.5 mm fluid nozzle
Apply several thin coats to avoid runs
Monitor the surface between coats – spraying too wet can ruin the final result
When the flake level is satisfactory
column2: clean the spray gun thoroughly and apply clear coat without flake

column1: To achieve a perfectly smooth surface:
allow the clear coat to fully cure
perform wet sanding only on a fully cured surface
preferably after 2–3 weeks (at approx. +20 °C painting conditions)
re-clear the surface following normal instructions
Note! Wet sanding must not be performed before the clear coat is fully cured.
Packaging Information
Package size: 50 g
Flake size: 008 x .008 hex
Coverage depends on the amount of flake used and the desired effect.

Custom Paints Metal Flake – Maximum Sparkle and a Unique Custom Finish
Custom Paints Metal Flake flakes are designed for anyone who wants to create a truly eye-catching and unique surface for cars
column5: or even arts and crafts projects. This is a <strong data-end=""414"" data-start=""369"">high-quality
column6: fine-grade metal flake that adds depth
column8: and a professional-level custom look to any surface.

column1: Metal flake can be applied over any base colour
column2: making every result completely unique. The amount of flake and the number of coats determine the intensity of the effect – from a subtle shimmer to a bold and aggressive custom finish. This premium metal flake is designed especially for demanding use where a <strong data-end=""1041"" data-start=""979"">durable
column4: and highly sparkling finish is required. The flakes are solvent resistant
column7: making application smooth and the final result clean and professional.

column1: Metal Flake Application & Use
Metal Flake can be mixed with:
1K and 2K clear coats
solvent-based and water-based lacquers
Arts & Crafts applications
Basic Application Steps:
Prepare the surface according to a standard paint process (sanding
Spray 2–3 coats of base colour
Add the Metal Flake to clear coat or another chosen binder
Spray the flake mixture until the desired effect is achieved. (Always perform a test spray first to determine the preferred flake/clear ratio.)
Once the flake layer is complete
column2: apply 2K clear coat until the flakes are fully covered and a high-gloss finish is achieved

column1: Tips for a Perfect Finish
Use a gravity-feed spray gun with a minimum 1.5 mm fluid nozzle
Apply several thin coats to avoid runs
Monitor the surface between coats – spraying too wet can ruin the final result
When the flake level is satisfactory
column2: clean the spray gun thoroughly and apply clear coat without flake

column1: To achieve a perfectly smooth surface:
allow the clear coat to fully cure
perform wet sanding only on a fully cured surface
preferably after 2–3 weeks (at approx. +20 °C painting conditions)
re-clear the surface following normal instructions
Note! Wet sanding must not be performed before the clear coat is fully cured.
Packaging Information
Package size: 50 g
Flake size: 008 x .008 hex
Coverage depends on the amount of flake used and the desired effect.

column1: Metal Flake Application & Use
Metal Flake can be mixed with:
1K and 2K clear coats
solvent-based and water-based lacquers
Arts & Crafts applications
Basic Application Steps:
Prepare the surface according to a standard paint process (sanding
Spray 2–3 coats of base colour
Add the Metal Flake to clear coat or another chosen binder
Spray the flake mixture until the desired effect is achieved. (Always perform a test spray first to determine the preferred flake/clear ratio.)
Once the flake layer is complete
column2: apply 2K clear coat until the flakes are fully covered and a high-gloss finish is achieved

column1: Tips for a Perfect Finish
Use a gravity-feed spray gun with a minimum 1.5 mm fluid nozzle
Apply several thin coats to avoid runs
Monitor the surface between coats – spraying too wet can ruin the final result
When the flake level is satisfactory
column2: clean the spray gun thoroughly and apply clear coat without flake

column1: To achieve a perfectly smooth surface:
allow the clear coat to fully cure
perform wet sanding only on a fully cured surface
preferably after 2–3 weeks (at approx. +20 °C painting conditions)
re-clear the surface following normal instructions
Note! Wet sanding must not be performed before the clear coat is fully cured.
Packaging Information
Package size: 50 g
Flake size: 008 x .008 hex
Coverage depends on the amount of flake used and the desired effect.

column1: Metal Flake Application & Use
Metal Flake can be mixed with:
1K and 2K clear coats
solvent-based and water-based lacquers
Arts & Crafts applications
Basic Application Steps:
Prepare the surface according to a standard paint process (sanding
Spray 2–3 coats of base colour
Add the Metal Flake to clear coat or another chosen binder
Spray the flake mixture until the desired effect is achieved. (Always perform a test spray first to determine the preferred flake/clear ratio.)
Once the flake layer is complete
column2: apply 2K clear coat until the flakes are fully covered and a high-gloss finish is achieved

column1: Tips for a Perfect Finish
Use a gravity-feed spray gun with a minimum 1.5 mm fluid nozzle
Apply several thin coats to avoid runs
Monitor the surface between coats – spraying too wet can ruin the final result
When the flake level is satisfactory
column2: clean the spray gun thoroughly and apply clear coat without flake

column1: To achieve a perfectly smooth surface:
allow the clear coat to fully cure
perform wet sanding only on a fully cured surface
preferably after 2–3 weeks (at approx. +20 °C painting conditions)
re-clear the surface following normal instructions
Note! Wet sanding must not be performed before the clear coat is fully cured.
Packaging Information
Package size: 50 g
Flake size: 008 x .008 hex
Coverage depends on the amount of flake used and the desired effect.

Troton V2018 Anticorrosive Rapid Drying HS 5:1 – Fast
column8: efficient and durable primer for demanding applications

column1: Troton V2018 is a high-quality
column3: specially designed for effective priming and corrosion protection of metal surfaces. Its fast-drying formula speeds up work and enables an efficient workflow in automotive repair shops and paint booths.

column1: The V2018 primer provides excellent adhesion to bare steel
column3: and galvanized surfaces. The 5:1 mixing ratio with hardener makes the mixture easy to work with and allows application both wet-on-wet and as a sandable primer. The product also performs well when thinned and is compatible with various paint systems.

column1: Grey colour. Package includes V2018 primer (3l)
Advantages
Very fast drying time (1 h / 20°C
Great filling capability
Easy to mix and apply
Excellent adhesion to difficult substrates
V2018 acrylic primer can be applied directly on the following surfaces:
Steel and aluminum (sanded and degreased)
Zinc-coated steel (sanded and degreased)
Sanded glass fibre-polyester laminates (GFK/GRP)
Polyester body fillers and putties
Wash primers (acid primers)
Old paint coatings in good condition (sanded and degreased)
Proper surface preparation is essential to achieve the best repair results.
Troton V2018 is a reliable choice when fast but high-quality priming is needed for demanding metal surfaces.

column1: Troton V2018 is a high-quality
column3: specially designed for effective priming and corrosion protection of metal surfaces. Its fast-drying formula speeds up work and enables an efficient workflow in automotive repair shops and paint booths.

column1: The V2018 primer provides excellent adhesion to bare steel

Very fast drying time (1 h / 20°C
Great filling capability
Easy to mix and apply
Excellent adhesion to difficult substrates
V2018 acrylic primer can be applied directly on the following surfaces:
Steel and aluminum (sanded and degreased)
Zinc-coated steel (sanded and degreased)
Sanded glass fibre-polyester laminates (GFK/GRP)
Polyester body fillers and putties
Wash primers (acid primers)
Old paint coatings in good condition (sanded and degreased)
Proper surface preparation is essential to achieve the best repair results.
Troton V2018 is a reliable choice when fast but high-quality priming is needed for demanding metal surfaces.

MIPA BC 2-SCHICHT BASISLACK liuotinohenteinen värimassa on loistava valinta candy-sävyjen luomiseen. Valitse kuudesta ainutlaatuisesta sävystä ja luo upea candy-sävyinen pinta autollesi!

";"

MIPA BC 2-SCHICHT BASISLACK solvent-based color paste is a great choice for creating candy shades. Choose from six unique shades and create a wonderful candy-colored surface for your car!

";"

Luo ainutlaatuiset candy sävyt autoosi MIPA BC 2-SCHICHT BASISLACK liuotinohenteisella värimassalla!

column2: tarjoten sinulle valikoiman kuutta ainutlaatuista sävyä:
että näitä sävyjä ei voida tilata merkkikohtaisilla koodeilla.
että värimassa on kaadettava värisihdin läpi!

column1: Kokeile itse ja näe ero! Candy-sävyjen luominen ei ole koskaan ollut näin helppoa!

";"

Create unique candy shades for your car with MIPA BC 2-SCHICHT BASISLACK solvent-thinned color paste!

This product provides an excellent base for candy shades
column2:
offering you a choice of six unique shades:

  • gold (A030)
  • fine silver (A010)
  • medium coarse silver (A014)
  • rough silver (A018)
  • very coarse silver (A020)
  • black (T970)

Please note that these shades cannot be ordered with brand specific codes.

MIPA BC-Verdünnung thinner is used to thin the color mass in a ratio of 2:1.

Technical information:

  • Injection times: 2
  • Injection pressure: 2-2.5 bar
  • Evaporation between layers: 10-20 min
  • Nozzle size: 1.3-1.4 mm
  • Viscosity: 18-22 s 4 mm DIN
  • Note that the color mass must be poured through a color filter!

Try it yourself and see the difference! Creating candy shades has never been easier!

";"sävypohja

column3: helvetica;"">DeVilbiss GTi Pro Lite paint sprayer for the demanding hobbyist or car painter!

column1: The DeVilbiss Gti Pro Lite paint sprayer meets the requirements of today's paint shops. It is designed to handle even finer paints such as metallics and pearls that can be challenging to spray. With Gti Pro Lite

The liquid nozzle and air nozzle of the sprayer are designed to break up the paint into very small droplets to achieve an even and precise spraying. The Gti Pro Lite comes with a TE10 air nozzle and a 1.3mm liquid nozzle and is suitable for water and solvent based paints and clear coats. The package also includes a 600 ml container. The stand in the picture is not included in the package.
Features of the DeVilbiss GTI PRO Lite paint sprayer:
• Transfer efficiency exceeds the 65% required by the EPA
• Material nozzle and needle made of high-quality stainless steel
• Built-in air valve = syringe lighter and construction even more reliable

column2: fan adjustment and material quantity adjustment are easy to make while wearing gloves

column1: • Light in the hand and easy to use
• A wide selection of nozzles for different applications
• Modular components make maintenance easier and faster
• An integrated filter can be used in the upper tank

column1: Luo näyttävä efekti kameleontti-spraymaalilla! Tämä erikoisväri vaihtaa sävyä valaistuksen ja katselukulman mukaan
column4: pyöriin ja muihin projekteihin. Helppo suihkuttaa ja antaa kiiltävän
column5: pitkäkestoisen pinnan. Saatavilla eri väriyhdistelmissä. Kameleontti Spray on erikoispinnoite

column1: <div class=""min-h-8 text-message flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 whitespace-normal break-words text-start [.text-message+&]:mt-5"" data-message-author-role=""assistant"" data-message-id=""85eb8ebf-79f9-4d0d-996d-30e8f222b066"" data-message-model-slug=""gpt-4o"" dir=""auto"">
<div class=""flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"">
<div class=""markdown prose w-full break-words dark:prose-invert light"">
Väriä vaihtava efekti – Kameleonttimaali muuttaa sävyään valon ja kulman mukaan.
Helppo levittää – Spraymuoto tekee levittämisestä vaivatonta niin aloittelijoille kuin ammattilaisille.
• Valmistele pinta – Puhdista ja kuivaa maalattava alue huolellisest
• Pohja– Parhaan lopputuloksen saat maalaamalla mustalle pohjalle (sävy RAL 9005). Valitse tuotteeksi liuotinohenteinen spray.
• Ravista pulloa hyvin – Varmista tasainen sekoitus ennen käyttöä.
• Suihkuta tasaisesti – Levitä 2-3 ohutta kerrosta 20–30 cm etäisyydeltä. Anna pinnan kuivua kerrosten välissä 5-15min.
• Lakkaus – Viimeistele pinta lakalla. Suosittelemme mipa 2k- lakkaa. Tutustu myös 2k- pakettiin niin saat pohjamaalin
Kameleontti Spray antaa projektillesi ainutlaatuisen ja ammattimaisen lopputuloksen. Luo upeita värisiirtymiä ja personoi ajoneuvosi tai muut esineesi helposti ja näyttävästi!

column3: helvetica;"">Brown masking paper intended for car painting for protection in painting work.

column1: Brown masking paper is an excellent product that protects the surfaces of a car or other object during the painting process. The masking paper prevents paint splatters and mist from sticking to surfaces that are not meant to be painted.
The masking paper is made of high-quality material that is strong enough to withstand the painting process and at the same time effectively protects the object.
The product is available in two different size rolls: 60 cm wide
column4: which weighs about 9 kg. Both rolls contain 280 meters of masking paper
column5: so one roll is enough for large painting projects.

column1: Note that the shiny side of the masking paper is left on the surface. This ensures the best possible protection against paint splashes.
Both rolls have 280 meters of masking paper.
NOTE! The shiny side is left on the surface side.

column3: helvetica;"">Brown masking paper intended for car painting for protection in painting work.

The masking paper is made of high-quality material that is strong enough to withstand the painting process and at the same time effectively protects the object.
The product is available in two different size rolls: 60 cm wide
column4: which weighs about 9 kg. Both rolls contain 280 meters of masking paper
column5: so one roll is enough for large painting projects.

tavallista vettä sekä kuumailmapuhallinta kaarevien pintojen teippauksessa.  Youtube sivuiltamme löydät videon jossa näet kuinka kiveniskuteippiä asennetaan. Kun käytät saippuavettä varmista saippuan PH-arvo
column3: arvon pitää olla 7(seitsemän). Sekoitussuhde saippuavedelle on 3-15 osaa saippuaa 100 osaan vettä eli 3-15:100. Saippuaveden käyttö pidentää asennusta
column4: koska vesi ei haihdu niin nopeasti. Kiireiset ja pienet työt voidaan tehdä käyttäen apuna puhdasta vettä.

column1: Varmistaaksesi hyvän pysyvyyden lämmitä teipin reunat huolellisesti (max. 80C.) Lasto myös teippi kauttaaltaan
column2: jotta ylinmääräinen vesi poistuu teipin alta
column3: sekä mahdolliset ilmakuplat tasoittuu. Lopuksi kuivaa pinnat ja poista asennuskalvo.

column1: Teipattavan alueen esivalmistelu on tärkeää! Osan pitää olla täysin puhdas

";"

Northern Lights Auto Refinish stone impact tape protects the paint surface of your vehicle from both stone impacts and scratches. The most common places to protect are: the edges of the tailgate
column3:
front bumpers and the front side of the hood.


During installation
column5: plain water and a hot air blower for taping curved surfaces.  On our YouTube page
column6: you can find a video where you can see how to install stone impact tape. When using soapy water
column7: make sure the PH value of the soap
column8: the value must be 7 (seven). The mixing ratio for soapy water is 3-15 parts soap to 100 parts water
column9: i.e. 3-15:100. Using soapy water prolongs the installation
column10:
because the water does not evaporate as quickly. Urgent and small jobs can be done using clean water.

To ensure good retention
column11: heat the edges of the tape carefully (max. 80C.) Also spread the tape all over
column12: so that excess water is removed from under the tape
column13: and possible air bubbles are smoothed out. Finally
column14:
dry the surfaces and remove the installation film.

Preparation of the area to be taped is important! The part must be completely clean
column15: we recommend washing the parts to be worked on with Troto's silicone detergent and finishing the cleaning with a dust cloth. To make working easier
column16:
pre-cut a suitable piece.

  • Stone tape thickness: 120 microns.
  • Heating: Up to 80C
  • Installation: With water or soapy water.
  • Includes installation film
  • Length 150cm

column1: Troton V2018 is a high-quality
column3: specially designed for effective priming and corrosion protection of metal surfaces. Its fast-drying formula speeds up work and enables an efficient workflow in automotive repair shops and paint booths.

column1: The V2018 primer provides excellent adhesion to bare steel
column3: and galvanized surfaces. The 5:1 mixing ratio with hardener makes the mixture easy to work with and allows application both wet-on-wet and as a sandable primer. The product also performs well when thinned and is compatible with various paint systems.

column1: Advantages
Very fast drying time (1 h / 20°C
Great filling capability
Easy to mix and apply
Excellent adhesion to difficult substrates
V2018 acrylic primer can be applied directly on the following surfaces:
Steel and aluminum (sanded and degreased)
Zinc-coated steel (sanded and degreased)
Sanded glass fibre-polyester laminates (GFK/GRP)
Polyester body fillers and putties
Wash primers (acid primers)
Old paint coatings in good condition (sanded and degreased)
Proper surface preparation is essential to achieve the best repair results.
Troton V2018 is a reliable choice when fast but high-quality priming is needed for demanding metal surfaces.
